title: epidendrum nocteva
intro: Epidendrum noctevae, also known as the night-blooming orchid, is a species of orchid that blooms only at night and wilts before sunrise. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum noctevae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
